creator: andrews@TECHNOLOGIST.COM
text:
Hi,

I'm not seeing this problem. I run Samba 2.0.6 on my gateway machine on the
localnet server, which runs FreeBSD 3.4-STABLE. My FreeBSD 5.0-CURRENT
laptop, across the network, uses DHCP to get its IP + DNS hosts for
configuration. It works fine when I use smbclient.

Therefore, I suspect your configuration is amiss and that you need to fix
something, either in your DNS or your Samba configuration. This PR,
meanwhile, should be closed, unless you can provide more verbose feedback.

JICIM, I'm running a BIND server, rather than simply relying on /etc/hosts,
but that shouldn't matter.

Thanks,
-- 
Will Andrews <andrews@technologist.com>
